'''鈭歯-sh-j''' ('''kanashaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twin|twin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twin|twin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-sh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kanashaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinashaj|thinashaj]] || [[word:jinashaj|jinashaj]] || [[word:shinashaj|shinashaj]] || [[word:kinashaj|kinashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunashaj|thuthunashaj]] || [[word:jujunashaj|jujunashaj]] || [[word:shushunashaj|shushunashaj]] || [[word:kukunashaj|kukunashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunashaj|thunashaj]] || [[word:junashaj|junashaj]] || [[word:shunashaj|shunashaj]] || [[word:kunashaj|kunashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunashaj|thunashaj]] || [[word:junashaj|junashaj]] || [[word:shunashaj|shunashaj]] || [[word:kunashaj|kunashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenashaj|thenashaj]] || [[word:jenashaj|jenashaj]] || [[word:shenashaj|shenashaj]] || [[word:kenashaj|kenashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonashaj|thothonashaj]] || [[word:jojonashaj|jojonashaj]] || [[word:shoshonashaj|shoshonashaj]] || [[word:kokonashaj|kokonashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonashaj|thonashaj]] || [[word:jonashaj|jonashaj]] || [[word:shonashaj|shonashaj]] || [[word:konashaj|konashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonashaj|thonashaj]] || [[word:jonashaj|jonashaj]] || [[word:shonashaj|shonashaj]] || [[word:konashaj|konashaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]] || [[word:nashaj|nashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nashaj|th忙nashaj]] || [[word:j忙nashaj|j忙nashaj]] || [[word:sh忙nashaj|sh忙nashaj]] || [[word:k忙nashaj|k忙nashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanashaj|thathanashaj]] || [[word:jajanashaj|jajanashaj]] || [[word:shashanashaj|shashanashaj]] || [[word:kakanashaj|kakanashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanashaj|thanashaj]] || [[word:janashaj|janashaj]] || [[word:shanashaj|shanashaj]] || [[word:kanashaj|kanashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanashaj|thanashaj]] || [[word:janashaj|janashaj]] || [[word:shanashaj|shanashaj]] || [[word:kanashaj|kanashaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanashaj|shanashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanashaj|goshanashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanashaj|gokishanashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanashajn眉|shanashajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanashajnkn眉|goshanashajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashajn眉|gokishanashajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanashajsh毛|shanashajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanashajnksh毛|goshanashajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanashajsh毛|gokishanashajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashajro|shanashajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashajnkro|goshanashajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashajro|gokishanashajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashajmu|shanashajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashajnkmu|goshanashajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashajmu|gokishanashajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanashajsher|shanashajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanashajnksher|goshanashajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanashajsher|gokishanashajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanashajng|shanashajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanashajnkng|goshanashajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanashajng|gokishanashajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanashajya|shanashajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanashajnkya|goshanashajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanashajya|gokishanashajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanashajyam|shanashajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanashajnkyam|goshanashajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanashajyam|gokishanashajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashajn眉sh毛|shanashajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashajnkn眉sh毛|goshanashajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashajn眉sh毛|gokishanashajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashajn眉ro|shanashajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashajnkn眉ro|goshanashajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashajn眉ro|gokishanashajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashajn眉mu|shanashajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashajnkn眉mu|goshanashajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashajn眉mu|gokishanashajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashajsh毛n眉|shanashajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashajnksh毛n眉|goshanashajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashajsh毛n眉|gokishanashajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashajsh毛ro|shanashajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashajnksh毛ro|goshanashajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashajsh毛ro|gokishanashajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashajsh毛mu|shanashajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashajnksh毛mu|goshanashajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashajsh毛mu|gokishanashajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashajron眉|shanashajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashajnkron眉|goshanashajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashajron眉|gokishanashajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashajrosh毛|shanashajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashajnkrosh毛|goshanashajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashajrosh毛|gokishanashajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanashajromu|shanashajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanashajnkromu|goshanashajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanashajromu|gokishanashajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanashajmun眉|shanashajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanashajnkmun眉|goshanashajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanashajmun眉|gokishanashajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanashajmush毛|shanashajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanashajnkmush毛|goshanashajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanashajmush毛|gokishanashajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanashajmuro|shanashajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanashajnkmuro|goshanashajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanashajmuro|gokishanashajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
